M

main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
The main entry point for the application.

Main.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
The main method to generate transaction logs.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 login.AccountInfoWriter
The entry point of application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 login.addKidTest
The main method is the entry point of the application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 login.Main
The main method serves as the entry point of the application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 login.test
The entry point of application, where various functionalities related to account and task management are tested.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Page.DeliverTaskPage
The entry point of the application for testing.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Page.GetTaskPage
The entry point of the application, used to start the GetTaskPage.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Page.homeGUI
The entry point of application.

The entry point of application.

The entry point of application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Page.ModifyPage
The entry point of application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Page.SetTaskPage
The entry point of application.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 Task.test
The entry point of application.
Main - login中的类
The Main class serves as the entry point for the application.
Main() - 类的构造器 login.Main
 
MainFrame - login中的类
The MainFrame class extends JFrame to create a main application window that uses CardLayout to manage different panels.
MainFrame() - 类的构造器 login.MainFrame
Constructs a new MainFrame, initializing the layout, setting the window's title, default close operation, size, and location.
ModifyHandler - Handler中的类
Handles mouse interactions for modifying tasks through a graphical user interface.
ModifyHandler(DefaultListModel<String>, Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Handler.ModifyHandler
Instantiates a new Modify handler.
ModifyPage - Page中的类
The ModifyPage class provides a user interface for modifying or deleting tasks.
ModifyPage(String, Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Page.ModifyPage
Constructs a new ModifyPage with the specified task details, homepage, and set task page references.
mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.ModifyHandler
Handles mouse click events, specifically double clicks on an item in the list, to open a page where the selected task can be modified.
mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.SubmitHandler
Handles mouse click events, specifically double clicks on an item in the list, to open a page where the selected task can be submitted.
